This game is one of the best Gorilla Tag copies for several reasons. One major reason is that it offers unlimited shiny rocks, allowing you to customize your avatar however you like. Additionally, the game updates quickly, keeping the experience fresh and exciting. Another reason is the active player base—whenever you log in, you don’t have to worry about finding a lobby, as there are always people online, unlike in some other Gorilla Tag clones. Plus, the game features long arms, adding to the fun and unique gameplay.

reviews.review_title: Why you should download this game.
reviews.review_description: Memory Tag V5 is a fan-made VR multiplayer game that takes heavy inspiration from Gorilla Tag’s core movement and tag mechanics. In it, players use physical arm motions to run, jump, and climb around 3D arenas while engaging in tag-style gameplay with others online. Like Gorilla Tag — which uses only hand propulsion rather than joystick movement to create immersive locomotion — Memory Tag V5 aims to replicate that same energetic, physical experience.

Memory Tag V5 shines here.

It’s not just “do levels until you’re bored”. Instead, you feel:
	•	Progress
	•	Improvement
	•	Pressure to do better

There’s a nice mix of:
✔️ Score chasing
✔️ Unlockable content  
✔️ Increasing intensity

If you’re competitive with yourself, you’ll love it.
